name: Elemental HERO Storm Neos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ストーム・ネオス
desc:
"Elemental HERO Neos" + "Neo-Spacian Air Hummingbird" + "Neo-Spacian Aqua Dolphin"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards you control into the Deck. Once per turn: You can destroy all Spells and Traps on the field. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Return this card to the Extra Deck. If this card is returned into the Extra Deck this way: Shuffle all cards on the field into the Deck.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Deck
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns itself from field to Extra Deck
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
